title: Evangelions Fan Base
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion's Fan-Base             Quote Post by 2Shea » Fri Dec 30, 2005 7:58 pm With NGE now showing on adultswim, I expected to see a rise in the fan base etc, but I haven't seen it so far. Does anyone think it is because of NGE's odd timeslot? On tursdays its fine but on saturdays its the very last show. Or is it because of the dub? I've allways been interested in evangelion, but didn't untill recently get very interested in it. I'd just like to see the fanbase continue to grow, even if this anime is getting on its years, we can allways hope for more. So whats everyones opinion on why its not become more popular stateside?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Fri Dec 30, 2005 8:06 pm EVA is a heart a mind fuck anime, and they are an aquired tast. Eva is like Lain, or boogie pop phantom it make you think and has few if any clear answeres to a lot of the questions raised.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Fri Dec 30, 2005 8:16 pm I blame the dub, some of the VA's were great and others....well sucked. The first time I saw the commitee scene I almost died laughing because some of their VA's just really sucked (I always felt sorry for the Russion dude). I'm guessing another reason is it doesn't offer instant gratification like rather mindless, more popullar series like Gundam do. There's no real villian, no end duel of heroes, no ultimate eva attack....and that bores most veiwers. The only positive thing about a rather static fan base is there hasn't been a major increase in Rei/Asuka fapboys.....thank god.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Fri Dec 30, 2005 8:39 pm I blame all factors. There is no incentive other than word-of-mouth to stay up and watch this show on television, and even that word is unfavorable given the circumstance of the dub. I blame no one who isn't watching.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Fri Dec 30, 2005 11:03 pm I've heard that NGE is getting pretty poor ratings on AS; maybe there's not a big upsurge of fans because hardly anyone is watching...

[]:             Quote Post by 2Shea » Fri Dec 30, 2005 11:12 pm I think thats mainly because of the times its being shown. Or just the fact that the action(anime) block all together on adult swim is under-advertised, and gets poor ratings itself, and just kind of left out of the whole adult swim loop which is now ruled by its comedy block.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Dec 31, 2005 1:04 am I don't think Evangelion fits their demographic very well. Most of the people that watch AS just want some cheap meaningless entertainment, and Evangelion is far from that. Not to mention that it's ten years old, and fairly established in the primary fanbase. I don't think Evangelion doesn't have much to gain from the TV airings. If anything, I think people will randomly tune in, see something shocking or interesting, and then go out and pick up Eva for fifty bucks at Wal-Mart.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Sat Dec 31, 2005 1:01 pm Wal-Mart carries anime?

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Sat Dec 31, 2005 6:20 pm Wal-Mart carries the movies at its locations and the series online. That actually surprised me, as it shows that their restrictions on the sale of "vulgar" music do not apply to the visual arts. Don't buy from Wal-Mart, though. They warrant death.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sun Jan 01, 2006 11:39 pm I imagine that any serious influx of a new fanbase will follow either the airing of the final TV episodes and/or any airing of End of Evangelion that might take place. Before than, most will likely not go seeking for answers, as they believe all will be elucidated shortly.

[]:             Quote Post by Rosa_Gigantea » Mon Jan 02, 2006 12:26 pm Shin-seiki wrote: I've heard that NGE is getting pretty poor ratings on AS; maybe there's not a big upsurge of fans because hardly anyone is watching...

[]:             Quote Post by ferrarimanf355 » Tue Jan 03, 2006 12:02 am Rosa_Gigantea wrote: Shin-seiki wrote: I've heard that NGE is getting pretty poor ratings on AS; maybe there's not a big upsurge of fans because hardly anyone is watching...

[]:             Quote Post by Eternal Yamcha » Tue Jan 03, 2006 4:39 am To be honest, I was awaiting a serious horde of Evangelion fans in my local area to start running up to me asking questions about the series... But it hasn't happened. I am dead serious here, all these people watch the anime on AS and I've yet to find anyone new who is into it... Which kind of sucks, to be honest. I believe it's the obscure time slots, they'd have to through it in a better time slot then we'd see an increase of new people... Though how large that increase would be is up in the air.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jan 03, 2006 12:41 pm I would imagine that the series is well enough known, and has been around long enough, that most people who would be interested in seeing it already have; and the actual increment of new fans will be small.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Tue Jan 03, 2006 12:55 pm ferrarimanf355 wrote: Rosa_Gigantea wrote: Shin-seiki wrote: I've heard that NGE is getting pretty poor ratings on AS; maybe there's not a big upsurge of fans because hardly anyone is watching...

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Tue Jan 03, 2006 1:56 pm What episode is Adult Swim up to now? Anything less than episode #19 and I'm not too surprised at the lack of influx of new talent.

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Tue Jan 03, 2006 2:15 pm damn it omf, u stole what i was gana say! But yeah the series is all fun and games in the first 14 episodes with few serius parts, then in the later episodes (speshaly kawaru epsidoe ) then its all serius and cool. kinda like argentosoma. if u havent seen it its got some cool stuff kinda slowish and seemingly p[ointless until it reaches ep 17 or 18 then it goes crazy.

[]:             Quote Post by Shnooks » Tue Jan 03, 2006 8:02 pm Lol, Look. I appeared. The fanbase is going downhill. Look, stop trying to act smart when you dont get it. It just fails.

[]:             Quote Post by sachiel » Tue Jan 03, 2006 8:09 pm I stopped caring after episode 4 aired. I literally used to wake up whenever it would come on, if I left AS on. I blame Spike Spencer's obnoxious voice. People might not be flooding into these forums so much, but I've noticed a lot more people on Gaia Online know about Evangelion, whereas before it was all "lol inuyasha and naruto lololol wtf is eva". I'm not really sure if that's good or not.. o.o (I appeared too. O: )

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Tue Jan 03, 2006 11:39 pm AAAGHH Inuyasha! Its become one of the banes of my existance, right after calc classes.

Does anyone think it is because of NGE's odd timeslot? On tursdays its fine but on saturdays its the very last show. Or is it because of the dub?
